title: navarretia leucocephala subsp. bakeri
intro: Navarretia leucocephala subsp. bakeri, also known as Baker's whitestem navarretia, is a rare, perennial plant species that belongs to the phlox family (Polemoniaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Navarretia leucocephala subsp. bakeri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves or flowers in water to create a tea or decoction, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
